title: EvalRunner
description: SPEC 11.8 evals/runner.json (AD-020, FR-017). Committed values are gate identity; changing any is an explicit eval-policy commit (OQ-017f pins the initial values). rev 2026-07-12: temperature removed — the harness sends no sampling parameters (the pinned model rejects non-default ones with a 400). rev 2026-07-14 (AD-024/OQ-027): a `harness` block pins the real host (Claude Agent SDK reference) beside the model — gate identity; a change to it is an eval-policy commit that resets the baseline (SPEC §11.8).

tool_budget.description: caps total tool calls per run (OQ-017c)

seed.description: passed through when the provider supports it (OQ-017c)

harness.description: AD-024/OQ-027 — the real host that runs the skill; gate identity beside the model pin. v1 implements kind 'agent-sdk' (the Claude Agent SDK reference host); 'claude-code' (headless claude -p) is admitted by the shape but unimplemented. version pins the host (e.g. the claude-agent-sdk package version). A change to kind or version is an eval-policy commit that resets evals/baseline.json (SPEC §11.8 / OQ-027b).
